title: Macao
writer: Bernard C. Schoenfeld, Stanley Rubin, Robert Creighton Williams
actors: Robert Mitchum, Jane Russell, William Bendix
plot: Nick Cochran, an American in exile in Macao, has a chance to restore his name by helping capture an international crime lord. Undercover, can he mislead the bad guys and still woo the attractive singer/petty crook, Julie Benson?
